content: Drizzle migration workflow for adding columns: 1) Update schema.ts with new column definitions, 2) Run 'npx drizzle-kit generate' — compares current schema against previous migration snapshot, produces new .sql file, 3) Run 'npx drizzle-kit migrate' against DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED (never pooled — PgBouncer doesn't support all DDL transaction semantics). Critical: adding a NOT NULL column to a table with existing rows requires a DEFAULT value in the migration file; drizzle-kit auto-generates the ALTER TABLE but you must manually add DEFAULT or the migration fails. New nullable columns work as-is. Upsert pattern uses .insert().values().onConflictDoUpdate({ target: table.userId, set: { fieldName: value } }).
